title: Mobile-first File Browser fitting (own-port, Monaco/Markdown/images, scoped+confined)

implement.detail: fittings/seed/file-browser: own-port server (port 7091) with a path-traversal-SAFE scoped file API (resolveInRoot + realpath ancestor guard + lstat symlink-target refusal), credential-file refusal (vault.json/internal-token/.env/*.key), same-origin CSRF guard, status-file/probe/free-port scaffolding; mobile-first dist/index.html (file list, Monaco-idiom textarea editor + Save, marked Markdown preview in a sandbox='' iframe, inline images); setup.sh + start.mjs; library.json entry + seedIds.

test.detail: file-browser (9, REAL server): list (dirs-first, credential hidden), read text+markdown, write-in-root, traversal 403 (read+write), credential 403, write-THROUGH-symlinked-dir 403, overwrite-THROUGH-symlinked-file 403, READ-through-symlink 403 (O_NOFOLLOW), cross-origin 403.

codexReview.detail: R1 (2 high): symlink write-escape + markdown XSS -> FIXED+tested (deepest-ancestor realpath, lstat target refusal, sandbox="" iframe). R2: confirmed; raised final-component + ancestor TOCTOU. R3: HARDENED reads (O_NOFOLLOW open) + writes (temp+rename, no follow-through) -> final-component swaps CLOSED+tested; residual ANCESTOR-DIR mid-syscall TOCTOU REBUTTED: immaterial in the localhost single-user trust model (a racer already has FS-write-as-user) AND not atomically closable in Node public fs API (no openat). All concrete/practical vectors closed+tested (9 tests).

codexPwTest.detail: Z1 opens the downloaded PDF in the browser
